content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 9, 0), (7, 8, 0), (1, 5, 3), (2, 5, 4), (1, 3, 6), (0, 1, 9), (0, 3, 9), (0, 7, 9), (2, 8, 11), (3, 7, 12), (5, 8, 12), (3, 4, 13), (3, 6, 13), (1, 6, 16), (6, 7, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 9.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (0, 9, 0) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 8, 0) has node 7 and time 0. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 5, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 5, 4) has node 2 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 3, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 1, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (0, 3, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 7, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 8, 11) has node 2 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 7, 12) has node 3 and time 12. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 4, 13) has node 3 and time 13. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 6, 13) has node 3 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 6, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 7, 17) has node 6 and time 17. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 9, 8, 5, 4, 3, 6, 7, 1, 3, 2, 16, and 17.

Answer: [9, 8, 5, 4, 3, 6, 7, 1, 3, 2, 16, 17]
